title: Training Manifest
description: Schema for training_manifest.json files emitted by the materialize_prereg_data / training-arms tooling.

materialization_seed.description: Seed used when materializing per-arm training data.

max_seq_length.description: Maximum tokenized sequence length used for training.

epochs.description: Number of training epochs per arm.

selected_arms.description: Ordered list of arm keys included in this materialization.

datasets.description: Mapping of dataset filename -> dataset record.

arms.description: Mapping of arm key -> arm record.

dataset_composition.description: Mapping of dataset filename -> ordered list of source corpus identifiers.

corpus_b_variant.description: Optional Corpus B content axis label (e.g. b1, b2).

ip_instruction.description: Optional inoculation-prompt instruction text used during training.

ip_instruction_id.description: Optional identifier for the inoculation-prompt instruction.

contrastive_pairs_augmentation.description: Optional contrastive-pairs augmentation configuration. Structure intentionally permissive.
